# Springfield Oracle

> Springfield Oracle is a free, open-source, fact-checked database tracking every meaningful Simpsons prediction against real-world events. Each entry cites the original episode, air date, and a sourced real-world event — verified against four criteria before being listed. The site exists to combat viral misinformation about Simpsons predictions by replacing unverified claims with traceable evidence.

Created by Isha Godboley. Licensed CC BY-NC 4.0. No ads, no commercial interests.

Prediction statuses: **Confirmed** (verifiably occurred), **Pending** (unfolding or unresolved), **Debunked** (AI-generated, misattributed, or fabricated).

Methodology: every entry must have (1) a traceable episode reference, (2) an external real-world source, (3) an assigned status, and (4) a deepfake/misinformation flag if applicable.

## Core Pages

- [Home — Full Prediction Database](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/): Searchable, filterable index of all 70+ verified Simpsons predictions with episode codes, air dates, real-world sources, and confirmation status.
- [About — Methodology & Mission](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/about): Explains the verification methodology, status definitions, ethical boundaries, and why this database was built.
- [FAQ](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/faq): Answers to the most-asked questions including COVID-19, Trump presidency, Disney/Fox, Higgs Boson, NSA surveillance, AI job replacement, and the March 2026 Trump death deepfake hoax.
- [Blog — Simpsons Predictions That Came True](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/blog/simpsons-predictions-that-came-true.html): Long-form editorial covering the most significant confirmed predictions with analysis.

## Notable Predictions

- [Donald Trump Presidency (S11E17, 2000)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s11e17-donald-trump-presidency): Confirmed — episode aired March 2000, Trump elected November 2016.
- [Higgs Boson / God Particle (S10E02, 1998)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s10e02-the-god-particle-higgs-boson): Confirmed — Homer's blackboard equation foreshadows the Higgs Boson mass, confirmed by CERN in 2012.
- [Disney Acquires Fox (S10E05, 1998)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s10e05-20th-century-fox-acquired-by-disney): Confirmed — Disney acquired 21st Century Fox in 2019.
- [Nobel Prize Winner Predicted by Name (S22E01, 2010)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s22e01-nobel-prize-winner-predicted-by-name): Confirmed — Bengt Holmström named by name, won Nobel Prize in Economics 2016.
- [COVID-19 / Osaka Flu (S04E21, 1993)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s04e21-osaka-flu-pandemic-hysteria): Confirmed — viral pandemic originating in Asia depicted in 1993.
- [NSA Mass Government Surveillance (S02E17, 1991)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s02e17-mass-government-surveillance-state): Confirmed — depicted mass domestic surveillance, confirmed by Snowden revelations in 2013.
- [Smartwatches (S06E19, 1995)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s06e19-smartwatches): Confirmed — wrist-based video communication device depicted 20 years before the Apple Watch.
- [Autocorrect Fails (S06E08, 1994)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s06e08-autocorrect-fails): Confirmed — parodied handwriting-to-text failure matching modern autocorrect behaviour.
- [Elon Musk Political Takeover (S26E10, 2015)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s26e10-elon-musk-political-takeover): Confirmed — depicted Musk acquiring government influence, manifested in DOGE role in 2025.
- [AI Robots Replace Human Workers (S23E17, 2012)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s23e17-ai-robots-replace-human-workers): Confirmed — depicted widespread automation displacing workers.
- [Cypress Hill + London Symphony Orchestra (S07E24, 1996)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s07e24-cypress-hill-london-symphony-orchestra): Confirmed — collab performed at Lollapalooza 2019.
- [FIFA Corruption Scandal (S25E16, 2014)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s25e16-fifa-corruption-scandal): Confirmed — FIFA bribery scandal broke in 2015.
- [Lady Gaga Aerial Super Bowl Halftime (S23E22, 2012)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-s23e22-lady-gaga-aerial-super-bowl-halftime): Confirmed — aerial performance depicted in 2012, occurred at Super Bowl LI in 2017.
- [Trump Death Prediction (Viral Hoax, 2026)](https://www.springfieldoracle.com/simpsons-trump-death-prediction-viral-hoax-2026): **Debunked** — AI-generated deepfake; no such episode exists. Full fact-check here.
